arts.ttl: Mykhailo Mudryk's Chelsea career summed up in two words amid failed drug test
arts.sum: As Mykhailo Mudryk took to the Stamford Bridge pitch at half-time of Chelsea's victory against Crystal Palace in January 2023, there was an air of excitement, buoyancy and optimism among supporters. However, despite his really promising debut, it was always going to take some time for Mudryk to settle in at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: What Everton takeover means for Arsenal, Chelsea, Tottenham as billionaire joins Premier League
arts.sum: Everton have become the latest Premier League club to be the subject of a successful takeover as the American-owned Friedkin Group acquired a majority stake in the club. Owner Dan Friedkin is said to be worth £6.16billion, making him the 363rd richest in the world, and already has Italian giants AS Roma in his catalogue of football clubs.
